title: <li>1.4.c     | Create calendar reminders for annual filings               | 30
content:
• 1.4.c | Create calendar reminders for annual filings | 30 min | 30 min | 2025-04-28
  • 1.5.a | Outline first grant targets (SHIP, CDBG, local) | 1 hr | 1 hr | 2025-04-29
  • 1.5.b | Research county SHIP program details | 1 hr | 1 hr | 2025-04-29
  • 1.5.c | Draft outreach email to city housing department | 45 min | 45 min | 2025-04-29
  • 1.6.a | Register for FL Charitable Solicitation (FDACS) | 1 hr | varies | 2025-04-30
  • 1.6.b | Set up FDACS renewal calendar | 15 min | 15 min | 2025-04-30
  • 1.7.a | Draft zoning research questions for property scouting | 1 hr | 1 hr | 2025-05-01
  • 1.7.b | Reach out to two local LGBTQ+ orgs to announce launch | 30 min | 30 min | 2025-05-01
  • 1.7.c | Schedule site-visit dates for Week 2 | 15 min | 15 min | 2025-05-01
